get.description:
Admin endpoint for effective permission resolution for a target user.

- Scope defaults to JWT/context when not explicitly provided.
- Permission hierarchy: 1) Role Template, 2) Tenant/Store overlays (allow/deny), 3) User overrides, 4) Effective permissions.
- Response includes canonical `subject`, resolved `permissions`, `denies_applied`, `sources_trace`, and `trace_id`.

post.description:
Creates a store under an explicit tenant scope.

- **Canonical input**: send `tenant_id` in the JSON body.
- **Legacy compatibility**: optional `query_tenant_id` is supported only for backward compatibility.
- **Consistency rule**: when both values are sent, `tenant_id` and `query_tenant_id` must match.
- **Admin rule**: `SUPERADMIN` and `PLATFORM_ADMIN` must provide an explicit tenant (no implicit fallback).

post.description:
Creates a user in tenant scope with role/store validations.

- **Canonical input**: send `store_id` in the JSON body.
- **Tenant resolution**: backend derives `tenant_id` from `store.tenant_id`.
- **Deprecated field**: body `tenant_id` is optional and validated only for payload consistency.

post.description:
Dispatches one admin action over a user.

- `action=set_status`: requires `status`.
- `action=set_role`: requires `role`.
- `action=reset_password`: optional `temporary_password`; if omitted, server generates one.
- `transaction_id` is required for idempotency/audit correlation.

Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Lowercase variants are accepted only for backward compatibility.

tenant_id.title: Tenant Id
tenant_id.description: Canonical tenant for store creation. Superadmin/platform admin must provide this field and no implicit fallback to token default tenant is applied.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role whose policy was resolved for this store scope.

status.title: Status
status.description: Required when `action=set_status`. Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Lowercase variants are accepted only for backward compatibility.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current tenant status. Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Lowercase variants are accepted only for backward compatibility.

action.title: Action
action.description: Action to execute. `set_status` uses `status`, `set_role` uses `role`, and `reset_password` optionally uses `temporary_password`.

status.title: Status
status.description: Required only when `action=set_status`. Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Lowercase variants are accepted only for backward compatibility.

temporary_password.title: Temporary Password
temporary_password.description: Optional only when `action=reset_password`. If omitted, server generates a temporary password.

transaction_id.title: Transaction Id
transaction_id.description: Required for all actions to correlate idempotency and audit events.

tenant_id.title: Tenant Id
tenant_id.description: Deprecated: tenant scope is derived from store_id on the backend.

role.title: Role
role.description: Resolved user role as persisted in runtime.

status.title: Status
status.description: Canonical lifecycle status (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Canonical values are uppercase (`ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CANCELED`). Lowercase variants are accepted only for backward compatibility.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Backward-compatible derived flag. `ACTIVE` maps to `true`; `SUSPENDED`/`CANCELED` map to `false`.

VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest.title: VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest
VariantFieldSettingsPatchRequest.description: Partial update payload. Omitted fields remain unchanged.

tenant_id.description: Deprecated: tenant scope is resolved from JWT/context.

OAuth2PasswordBearer.description: Paste JWT bearer token obtained from `/aris3/auth/login` or `/aris3/auth/token`.

UnauthorizedError.description: Unauthorized. Returned when the bearer token is missing, invalid, or expired.

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden. Returned when the token is valid but lacks required permissions.

tags.name: Admin Tenants
tags.description: Tenant lifecycle administration (list, create, update, delete, status actions).

tags.name: Admin Stores
tags.description: Store administration endpoints, including tenant-scoped creation and lifecycle actions.

tags.name: Admin Users
tags.description: User administration endpoints (CRUD plus operational actions such as status/role/password updates).

tags.name: Admin Access Control
tags.description: Administrative access-control management (role templates, tenant/store overlays, user overrides). Scope is resolved from JWT/context when not explicit.

tags.name: Access Control (Self)
tags.description: Self-service access-control read endpoints resolved from the authenticated request context.
